mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates reduce the discount rate for equity valuations, leading to higher S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window or positive returns do not exceed 55% when FEDFUNDS declines.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in the unemployment rate above 9.0% signals severe labor market deterioration, triggering risk-off sentiment and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in real personal consumption expenditures and housing starts indicates broad-based demand recovery, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Interaction term loses statistical significance (p > 0.10) in multivariate regression or joint positive signals yield negative forward returns > 50% of the time.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production during a monetary easing cycle reflects improving supply-side capacity without inflationary pressure, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Signal direction flips to negative during monetary easing periods or Rank IC drops below 0.02 in this specific regime.

mechanism_narrative: CPI inflation exceeding 220 on the index scale triggers expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, compressing equity multiples and causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in > 55% of instances when CPIAUCSL exceeds 220.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising nonfarm payrolls and stagnant unemployment rate indicates labor market tightness and wage pressure, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days due to margin compression fears.
failure_condition: Joint signal fails to predict negative returns with > 50% accuracy or interaction coefficient becomes insignificant in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Expanding real GDP growth signals robust economic expansion, supporting corporate earnings growth and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window or positive returns do not exceed 55% when GDPC1 growth is positive.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production falling below 90.0 of its 2017 base index signals severe supply contraction and recessionary conditions, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.
